title: Club Mahindra is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Club Mahindra is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Club Mahindra in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Club Mahindra:
Club Mahindra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Club Mahindra!
